opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I had a simple cold about three weeks ago, but now my body feels like it weighs a thousand pounds, and taking a shower puts me in bed for two days. I can barely get around the house. Something is really wrong and I'm scared I'll never get back to normal.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I thought I'd be better by now but instead I've completely collapsed and I can't function — I'm stuck in bed and I live on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about three weeks ago, right after I got over a cold
symptom_narrative.duration: three weeks and it hasn't lifted
symptom_narrative.character: a bone-deep, heavy exhaustion, like my whole body is made of lead
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: completely wiped out — worse than any tiredness I've ever had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my whole body, and my head feels foggy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, and much worse for a day or two after I do anything
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps, even sleeping a lot
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any effort at all — even a shower or trying to think hard wipes me out for days
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my muscles and joints ache a bit, I can't concentrate, and my sleep doesn't refresh me no matter how long I sleep
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never been like this before — I usually bounce back from colds fine
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically bed-bound; even basic things like showering or cooking cost me everything

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, feeling very anxious and distressed about not being able to function and frightened this might be permanent

objective_data_offered.value: normal, around 36.8 C when I check it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-checked with a home thermometer; the patient feels intermittently feverish but has not measured a raised temperature

objective_data_offered.value: looks very tired and drained on video, speaking slowly and pausing a lot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: general appearance only; no clinician examination possible over video
